title: Verify PR title uses issue title with type prefix
description: Test that when Kody creates a PR from an issue, the PR title is `<type>: <issue title>` (e.g., `feat: [run-20260407-1908] T15: PR title from issue title`) rather than an LLM-generated verbose summary. Per T15 specification: read PR title via `gh pr view <n> --json title`, read issue title via `gh issue view <n> --json title`, verify PR title matches `<type>: <issue title>` format.
existing_patterns: .kody/watch/agents/test-suite/agent.md - T15 test definition with verification steps (lines 897-904)
gh pr view and gh issue view commands used to compare PR vs issue titles
PR title format `<type>: <issue title>` per test-suite specification
